---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements to documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Issue

Describe what documentation is missing, unclear, or incorrect.

## Location

Where is this documentation located or where should it be added?

- [ ] API documentation (rustdoc)
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Module-level documentation
- [ ] Other: _______________

## Proposed Improvement

What should be added, changed, or clarified?

## Additional Context

Links to related documentation, examples, or specifications.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing documentation issues
- [ ] I have identified the specific location needing improvement
- [ ] I am willing to submit a PR to fix this (optional)
